description_long: This is a modern athletic soccer cleat featuring a streamlined silhouette and a low-cut design for optimal foot mobility. The upper is primarily gray with a gradient transition to white at the toe, accented by an orange stripe that wraps around the midfoot. The lateral side displays a large white geometric logo, while the medial side features subtle linear graphics. The shoe is equipped with molded studs on the sole for traction on grass or turf, and the lacing system is a standard criss-cross style for secure fit adjustment. The material appears to be a combination of synthetic leather and mesh, providing durability and breathability. The overall construction suggests a lightweight yet supportive shoe suitable for high-performance sports use.
description: A modern gray and white soccer cleat with orange accents, molded studs, and a large geometric logo on the side. The shoe features a streamlined, low-cut design and a standard criss-cross lacing system.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, white mesh texture, and the start of the orange accent near the laces.
description_view_1: Lateral side view highlighting the large white geometric logo, orange stripe, and molded studs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel with white linear graphics and the back profile of the shoe.
description_view_3: Medial side view showing the orange accent, subtle linear graphics, and the studded sole.
attribute_logo: Large white double-diamond geometric logo on the lateral side near the heel.
